task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the customer 'Nebula Stream' with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a customer list, table, or creation form showing the customer name 'Nebula Stream' and the description 'Enterprise streaming solutions provider'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the project 'Legacy System Migration' and its association with the customer 'Nebula Stream'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a project list or creation form showing the project name 'Legacy System Migration' explicitly linked to or categorized under the customer 'Nebula Stream'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project description is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Migrating COBOL mainframes to cloud infrastructure' in the project details, description field, or project summary table.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Admin User' is assigned as the Project Admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Admin User' listed under the 'Project Admins' section, input field, or column for the 'Legacy System Migration' project.

task_completion.description: Verify the activities 'Code Analysis' and 'Data Transfer' are added to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Code Analysis' and 'Data Transfer' in the Activities list, table, or section specifically associated with the 'Legacy System Migration' project.

integrity.description: The agent used the web application GUI to configure the project portfolio, not terminal scripts or direct database injections.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interface (likely OrangeHRM) loaded, with the agent interacting with web forms, dropdowns, and buttons.

integrity.description: The agent actually typed the information into the application rather than just displaying the text in a notepad or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text inputs for customer name, project name, descriptions, and activities should be visible within the application's actual input fields or saved data tables.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screens or data tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: No developer console, inspect element panels, or page source windows should be open in the screenshots showing the final results.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Customer Name: 'Nebula Stream'. Target Customer Description: 'Enterprise streaming solutions provider'. Target Project Name: 'Legacy System Migration'.
